title: Yusuf Pathan to quit TMC? Mamata loyalist blames Amit Shah for 'breaking' party, says very happy that...: 10 points
description: TMC leader Kalyan Banerjee confirmed that TMC MP Yusuf Pathan will meet Amit Shah in Delhi.  Another MP Mahua Moitra accused Pathan of travelling to Delhi following Home Minister Amit Shah's line.
